permissions.fallback_msg: This skill needs to read local files (scripts, .env, README content). Allow filesystem read access?
This skill may write local files (e.g., .env, generated YAML, output artifacts). Allow filesystem write access?
This skill executes shell commands including `uv run`, `nvidia-smi`, `hf jobs uv run`, and Python scripts. Allow shell execution?
This skill reads Python scripts in the `scripts/` directory. Allow reading version-controlled source files?
This skill may generate or modify Python evaluation scripts. Allow writing version-controlled source files?
This skill can push changes directly to Hugging Face model repositories (--apply flag). Allow pushing commits to remote repositories?
This skill fetches README content, model card data, and PR listings from Hugging Face Hub. Allow outbound HTTP read requests?
This skill submits evaluation results and creates pull requests on Hugging Face Hub. Allow write-like HTTP/HTTPS requests?
This skill calls the Artificial Analysis API to import benchmark scores. Allow calls to external third-party API endpoints?
This skill inspects GPU availability via `nvidia-smi` and checks for `uv` installation. Allow querying host process/hardware state?
This skill launches Python subprocesses and `uv run` child processes for evaluation scripts. Allow creating new host processes?
This skill installs Python dependencies automatically via PEP 723 script headers with `uv run` (e.g., lighteval, vllm, torch). Allow package installation?
This skill reads HF_TOKEN and AA_API_KEY from environment variables and .env files. Allow reading sensitive secrets/API keys?
This skill reads environment variables such as HF_TOKEN and AA_API_KEY. Allow reading environment variables?
This skill makes outbound network requests to Hugging Face Hub and Artificial Analysis API. Allow outbound network client access?
